title: salvia officinalis f. gallica
intro: Salvia officinalis f. gallica, also known as French lavender sage or Gallic sage, is a variety of the Salvia officinalis plant, which is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Salvia officinalis f. gallica include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting respiratory health. Salvia officinalis f. gallica can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness.
